controls.title: Governance and organisation
controls.description: Financial entities shall have an internal governance and control framework ensuring effective and prudent management of ICT risk.

controls.title: ICT risk management framework
controls.description: Financial entities shall have a sound, comprehensive and well-documented ICT risk management framework.

controls.title: ICT systems, protocols and tools
controls.description: Financial entities shall use and maintain updated ICT systems, protocols, and tools that are appropriate, reliable, and have sufficient capacity.

controls.title: Identification
controls.description: Financial entities shall identify, classify and adequately document all ICT-supported business functions, roles, information assets, and ICT assets.

controls.title: Protection and prevention
controls.description: Financial entities shall continuously monitor and control the security and functioning of ICT systems.

controls.title: Detection
controls.description: Financial entities shall have mechanisms to promptly detect anomalous activities, network performance issues, and ICT-related incidents.

controls.title: Response and recovery
controls.description: Financial entities shall put in place a comprehensive ICT business continuity policy.

controls.title: Backup policies and recovery methods
controls.description: Maintain backup policies specifying scope, frequency, and recovery time objectives.

controls.title: Learning and evolving
controls.description: Financial entities shall gather information on vulnerabilities and cyber threats, ICT-related incidents, and shall conduct post-incident reviews.

controls.title: Communication
controls.description: Financial entities shall have crisis communication plans for responsible disclosure of ICT-related incidents.

controls.title: Simplified ICT risk management framework
controls.description: Simplified requirements for entities that are microenterprises or subject to simplified obligations.

controls.title: ICT-related incident management process
controls.description: Financial entities shall define, establish and implement an ICT-related incident management process.

controls.title: Classification of ICT-related incidents
controls.description: Financial entities shall classify ICT-related incidents based on specified criteria.

controls.title: Reporting of major ICT-related incidents
controls.description: Financial entities shall report major ICT-related incidents to the relevant competent authority.

controls.title: Harmonisation of reporting content and templates
controls.description: ESAs shall develop common reporting templates for incident reports.

controls.title: General requirements for digital operational resilience testing
controls.description: Financial entities shall establish and maintain a comprehensive digital operational resilience testing programme.

controls.title: Testing of ICT tools and systems
controls.description: Testing programme shall include a range of assessments, tests, methodologies, practices and tools.

controls.title: Advanced testing by means of TLPT
controls.description: Threat-led penetration testing at least every 3 years for entities identified for advanced testing.

controls.title: General principles for ICT third-party risk management
controls.description: Financial entities shall manage ICT third-party risk as an integral component of ICT risk.

controls.title: Preliminary assessment of ICT concentration risk
controls.description: Assess ICT concentration risks before entering into contractual arrangements.

controls.title: Key contractual provisions
controls.description: Contractual arrangements for ICT services shall include specified provisions.

controls.title: Designation of critical ICT third-party service providers
controls.description: ESAs shall designate critical ICT third-party service providers.

changelog.change: Initial seed — 22 key articles from Digital Operational Resilience Act
changelog.author: emmanuelgjr
